ground_truth.title: Latest Cybersecurity News and Articles
ground_truth.main_content: Latest cybersecurity news and articles including: GachiLoader - A sophisticated malware distribution campaign leveraging YouTube Ghost Network to deploy a heavily obfuscated Node.js-based loader delivering Rhadamanthys infostealer. Clop ransomware gang targeting Gladinet CentreStack file servers in a new data theft extortion campaign. Microsoft releasing an out-of-band update (KB5074976) to fix Message Queuing (MSMQ) issues in Windows 10. A sophisticated PDF phishing campaign weaponizing documents to steal corporate credentials. DIG AI emergence as an uncensored darknet AI assistant showing 200% increase in malicious AI tool mentions. Critical vulnerability in Motors WordPress theme potentially allowing site takeover. DOJ takedown of E-Note, an alleged money laundering platform used by cybercriminal groups. China-aligned LongNosedGoblin APT group exploiting Windows Group Policy to target government institutions. Amazon blocking over 1,800 suspected North Korean scammers from securing remote jobs since April 2024. November 2025 phishing email trends report highlighting attacker tactics and techniques.
with: GachiLoader: Defeating Node.js Malware with API Tracing GachiLoader: Defeating Node.js Malware
The Clop ransomware gang is actively targeting Gladinet CentreStack file servers in a new data theft extortion campaign.
Microsoft has released an out-of-band (OOB) update (KB5074976) to address issues with the Message Queuing (MSMQ) functionality in Windows 10

The emergence of DIG AI, an uncensored darknet AI assistant, has been identified as a significant threat, with a notable increase of over 200% in mentions and use of malicious AI tools from 2024 to 2025
Amazon has successfully blocked over 1,800 suspected North Korean scammers from securing remote jobs since April 2024
